Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.http
HTTP Part Annotations
org.apache.juneau.http.part
Next-generation HTTP part (query/form/path) implementations.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart
REST HTTP Parts
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.http.part used by org.apache.juneau.http
    Class
    Description
    PartList
    An ordered, immutable list of HttpPart instances that also implements HttpBody for URL-encoded form submission.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.http.part used by org.apache.juneau.http.part
    Class
    Description
    HttpBooleanPart
    An HttpPart whose value is a boolean.
    HttpCsvArrayPart
    An HttpPart whose value is a comma-delimited list of strings.
    HttpDatePart
    An HttpPart whose value is an ISO-8601 date-time.
    HttpIntegerPart
    An HttpPart whose value is an integer.
    HttpLongPart
    An HttpPart whose value is a long integer.
    HttpPartBean
    Root concrete implementation of HttpPart.
    HttpPartList
    A mutable, ordered list of HttpPart instances.
    HttpStringPart
    An HttpPart whose value is a string.
    HttpUriPart
    An HttpPart whose value is a URI.
    PartList
    An ordered, immutable list of HttpPart instances that also implements HttpBody for URL-encoded form submission.
